positive: A stylized, minimalist geometric depiction of a majestic forest owl perched on a winding branch. The design should incorporate clean, contrasting linework and bold, symmetrical patterns inspired by Art Deco and nature motifs. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep indigo, warm terracotta, and forest green against a creamy off-white background. The owl's silhouette should be striking and highly decorative. Emphasize negative space and graphic impact, making it perfect for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, detailed linework, woodcut style, clean vector aesthetic, high contrast, symmetry, illustration for apparel print.
negative: blurry, amateur, noise, watermark, text, logo, copyright, poor anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, low detail, gradients, photorealistic, messy, dirty
